case_title: RAITER, SAMUEL VS CONCEPTS FOR TODAY et al

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL TO CONCEPTS FOR TODAY RETURNED NO SUCH NUMBER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAITER, SAMUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONCEPTS FOR TODAY NY, DAN $1,440.00 PRINCIPAL, $27.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,467.00, PLFT TO RETURN THE 4 CHAIRS TO DEFT WITHIN 2 WEEKS OF MAILING OF THIS JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL TO DAN NY OWNER CONCEPT FOR TODAY RETURNED SIGNED.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAITER, SAMUEL HEARING SET FOR OCT-29-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM OCT-29-1996 TO NOV-26-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAITER, SAMUEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CONCEPTS FOR TODAY NY, DAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF NOV-26-1996, GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RAITER, SAMUEL AS TO DEFENDANT CONCEPTS FOR TODAY NY, DAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
